attributes.name: [AWS RDS OTel] Average read latency 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: Tracks per-I/O read storage latency from CloudWatch RDS metrics. At least 99.5% of 1-minute intervals per DB instance should show average read latency below 10 milliseconds, reflecting healthy gp3-class storage performance and protecting read-heavy application workloads from storage bottlenecks.

params.filter: data_stream.dataset: "aws.rds.otel" AND attributes.Namespace: "AWS/RDS" AND attributes.MetricName: "ReadLatency" AND attributes.stat: "Average"
